title: Adaptive and Agentic RAG Loops · Language Clinic: Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router
summary: An agent decides whether and how often to retrieve, rewrites until satisfied, calls broad tools, stores its own answers as memory, and has no stop, budget, or trace contract. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the adaptive retrieval router increment in bounded adaptive retrieval state machine. Learners progress…
objectives: Route no-retrieval, lexical, dense, hybrid, structured, web, or human paths using explicit features, authority, cost, risk, and evaluated fallback.
Plan bounded multi-hop retrieval, preserve path and source evidence, detect cycles and missing links, and compare against a simpler baseline.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A worked example RAG engineering team handles case 7562 during a multimodal maintenance-manual release. Build deterministic Python evidence to bound adaptive retrieval, decomposition, tool authority, confidence, stop reasons, and loop evidence; preserve source provenance, tenant authorization, deletion, freshness, citation offsets, and untrusted-data separation; then remove one supporting source and require abstention instead of a plausible unsupported answer. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Route no-retrieval, lexical, dense, hybrid, structured, web, or human paths using explicit features, authority, cost, risk, and evaluated fallback. A defensible solution applies Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to bounded adaptive retrieval state machine.

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-agentic-adaptive-rag-3
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-agentic-adaptive-rag-3.
# Case 5798: a multimodal maintenance-manual release.
# Operating constraint: retain corpus, document, chunk, model, index, prompt, query, and evaluation version identity.
# Changed case: move the only supporting passage to the middle of the context and rerun the position slice.
def worked_rag_agentic_adaptive_rag_3(retrieval_rounds: int = 2, maximum_rounds: int = 4, tool_calls: int = 1, maximum_tool_calls: int = 3, confidence: float = 0.82, authorization_checked: bool = True, stop_reason: str = "evidence-sufficient") -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "corpusworked3",
        "query3dekrow",
        "tenant5798",
        "indexworked35798",
        "prompt3dekrow5798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if retrieval_rounds < 0 or retrieval_rounds > maximum_rounds:
        return False, retrieval_rounds, "retrieval-loop"
    if tool_calls < 0 or tool_calls > maximum_tool_calls:
        return False, tool_calls, "tool-budget"
    if not 0.0 <= confidence <= 1.0:
        return False, retrieval_rounds, "confidence-range"
    if not authorization_checked:
        return False, tool_calls, "tool-authorization"
    if stop_reason not in {"evidence-sufficient", "budget", "abstain"}:
        return False, retrieval_rounds, "stop-contract"
    assert retrieval_rounds <= maximum_rounds
    return True, retrieval_rounds, stop_reason

steps.title: RAG and Python Build Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router evidence · Theory Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: rag-adaptive-retrieval-router-ugumhb" that uses case 5005 to bound adaptive retrieval, decomposition, tool authority, confidence, stop reasons, and loop evidence. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import third-party packages, load models, open files or sockets, contact vector databases or provider APIs, read credentials or host state, execute commands, or cause external effects; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, pinned native packages, evaluated models, disposable data and indexes, controlled services, load, fault, recovery, security, accessibility, and production gates.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Build Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router evidence · Theory Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router into observable performance evidence. For RAG and Python Build Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router evidence · Theory Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router, keep Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-adaptive-retrieval-router-ugumhb
# Competency: rag-adaptive-retrieval-router.
# Case 5005: a regulated document deletion request.
# Operating constraint: measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score.
# Changed case: remove one supporting source and require abstention instead of a plausible unsupported answer.
def evidence_rag_adaptive_retrieval_router_ugumhb(retrieval_rounds: int = 2, maximum_rounds: int = 4, tool_calls: int = 1, maximum_tool_calls: int = 3, confidence: float = 0.82, authorization_checked: bool = True, stop_reason: str = "evidence-sufficient") -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_ugumhb = "ugumhb-bhmugu-5005"
    assert evidence_variant_ugumhb
    evidence_axes_ugumhb = (
        "corpusugumhb",
        "querybhmugu",
        "tenant5005",
        "indexugumhb5005",
        "promptbhmugu5005",
        "evaluation5005ugumhb",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_ugumhb)) == 6
    if retrieval_rounds < 0 or retrieval_rounds > maximum_rounds:
        return False, retrieval_rounds, "retrieval-loop"
    if tool_calls < 0 or tool_calls > maximum_tool_calls:
        return False, tool_calls, "tool-budget"
    if not 0.0 <= confidence <= 1.0:
        return False, retrieval_rounds, "confidence-range"
    if not authorization_checked:
        return False, tool_calls, "tool-authorization"
    if stop_reason not in {"evidence-sufficient", "budget", "abstain"}:
        return False, retrieval_rounds, "stop-contract"
    assert retrieval_rounds <= maximum_rounds
    return True, retrieval_rounds, stop_reason

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The structural check is only one gate. The following changed-case decision and explanation must also hold.

hints: For RAG and Python Build Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router evidence · Theory Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router, name the stakeholder, corpus, source, document, chunk, model, index, query, relevance, tenant, context, citation, evaluation, and transfer boundary, Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RAG and Python Build Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router evidence · Theory Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router, trace this concrete input and predict ingestion, normalization, retrieval, filter, fusion, reranking, context, claim, citation, abstention, latency, cost, failure, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A theory RAG engineering team handles case 5561 during an incident-response knowledge search. Build deterministic Python evidence to bound adaptive retrieval, decomposition, tool authority, confidence, stop reasons, and loop evidence; retain corpus, document, chunk, model, index, prompt, query, and evaluation version identity; then replace one exact identifier with a synonym and compare lexical, dense, and hybrid recall. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Route no-retrieval, lexical, dense, hybrid, structured, web, or human paths using explicit features, authority, cost, risk, and evaluated fallback.

For RAG and Python Build Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router evidence · Theory Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router, challenge the documented misconception with changed-query, changed-corpus, relevance, retrieval, grounding, citation, adversarial, accessibility, failure, recovery, and controlled native or production-transfer evidence: A model can reliably decide whether it needs external evidence without evaluation.

steps.title: RAG and Python Defend the Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router model · Theory Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory RAG engineering team handles case 9704 during a multimodal maintenance-manual release. Build deterministic Python evidence to bound adaptive retrieval, decomposition, tool authority, confidence, stop reasons, and loop evidence; keep browser execution pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of model, vector-database, network, file, credential, and host effects; then insert an untrusted instruction into a relevant document and prove it remains data. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Route no-retrieval, lexical, dense, hybrid, structured, web, or human paths using explicit features, authority, cost, risk, and evaluated fallback.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Defend the Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router model · Theory Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router model · Theory Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router, keep Rag Adaptive Retrieval Router connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Route no-retrieval, lexical, dense, hybrid, structured, web, or human paths using explicit features, authority, cost, risk, and evaluated fallback.

checks.pattern: # Evidence: rag-adaptive-retrieval-router-ugumhb(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?def\s+evidence_rag_adaptive_retrieval_router_ugumhb\s*\((?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?\)\s*(?:->[^:]+)?\s*:(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?retrieval_rounds > maximum_rounds)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?tool_calls > maximum_tool_calls)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?not authorization_checked)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?stop_reason not in)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?assert)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
